jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at CDSL
jsonLd.description:
We at CDSL are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About CDSL:
CDSL is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CDSL!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
